title: lci.mcp.search
description: Parameter schema for the MCP `search` tool. Mirrors the inline rules in create_search_validator() (src/mcp/validation.cpp) and validate_search_business_logic() (same file). The handler still enforces the pattern/patterns mutual-requirement business rule because JSON Schema cannot express 'at least one of these two string fields is non-empty' as cleanly as the existing helper.

pattern.description: Search pattern. Required unless `patterns` is provided. No minLength: agent tool-callers routinely send "" for optional params they don't use (repo-QA traces: 91% of one model's calls failed on minLength); the handler's business rule enforces that at least one of {pattern, patterns} is non-empty.

patterns.description: Comma-separated multi-pattern OR search. At least one of {pattern, patterns} must be a non-empty string (enforced by the handler, not the schema).

max.description: Max results (clamped to [1,100] by the handler).

filter.description: Include ONLY matching files. Comma-separated language names, extensions, or globs matched against root-relative paths, e.g. 'go', 'md,*.yml', 'src/**/*.py'.

path.description: Root-relative path scope. A directory prefix ('src/http') limits matches to that subtree; a glob ('**/*.kt') is matched against the root-relative file path.

symbol_types.description: Comma-separated symbol types (function, class, method, variable, ...). Empty = no filter.

languages.description: Programming languages (e.g. ['go', 'typescript']). Builds an include_pattern over file extensions.

semantic.description: Enable semantic word-split expansion for multi-word patterns (default true).

include.description: Comma-separated include add-ons. Allowed: 'object_ids', 'breadcrumbs', 'refs', 'safety', 'deps'. Other values fail-fast listing the allowed set.
